HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

8
9#include <iostream>
10#include <string>
11#include <thread>
12#include <vector>
13#include "CLParser.h"
14#include "SIEFormPMCHW.h"
15#include "SimJob.h"
16
43int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
44 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
45 // Defaults for job configuration
46 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
47 std::string jobFile("input.job");
48 std::string solutionFile("output.sol");
49 std::string positionFile("points.pos");
50 std::string outPrefix("");
51 std::string tableFile("");
52 bool help(false);
53 bool NeedsAccurate(false);
54 int etm(1);
55 int threads(1);
56
57 // Flags selecting which field types to compute
58 bool fldE(false);
59 bool fldH(false);
60 bool fldD(false);
61 bool fldB(false);
62 bool fldP(false);
63 bool fldPw(false);
64
65 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
66 // Setup command line argument parsers
67 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
68 std::vector<CLParser *> clParser;
69 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-j", &jobFile));
70 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-s", &solutionFile));
71 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-p", &positionFile));
72 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-op", &outPrefix));
73 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("--help", &help));
74 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fE", &fldE));
75 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fH", &fldH));
76 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fD", &fldD));
77 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fB", &fldB));
78 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fP", &fldP));
79 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-fPw", &fldPw));
80 clParser.push_back(new CLStringOption("-t", &tableFile));
81 clParser.push_back(new CLFlag("-a", &NeedsAccurate));
82 clParser.push_back(new CLOption<int>("-etm", &etm));
83 clParser.push_back(new CLOption<int>("-th", &threads));
84
85 // Parse command line
86 for (std::vector<CLParser *>::iterator pIter = clParser.begin();
87 pIter != clParser.end(); pIter++) {
88 (*pIter)->Parse(argc, argv);
89 }
90
91 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
92 // Build field mask bitset
93 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
94 uint fields(0);
95 if ((fldE || fldH || fldD || fldB || fldP || fldPw) == false)
96 // Defaults: E and H fields
97 fields = EFIELD | HFIELD;
98 else {
99 // If field flags are given:
100 if (fldE) fields |= EFIELD;
101 if (fldH) fields |= HFIELD;
102 if (fldD) fields |= DFIELD;
103 if (fldB) fields |= BFIELD;
104 if (fldP) fields |= POYVEC;
105 if (fldPw) fields |= POWER;
106 }
107
108 std::cout << "Output fields type: " << fields << std::endl;
109
110 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
111 // Help or execution
112 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
113 if (help) {
114 std::cout << "HELIOS SIE simulation program, field output"
115 << std::endl;
116 std::cout << " usage: mainpp [-j JOBFILE] [-p POSITIONFILE] [fields]"
117 << std::endl;
118 std::cout << " defaults: -j input.job -p points.pos -fE -fH"
119 << std::endl;
120 std::cout << " possible fields are E, H, D, B, P (Poynting vectors)"
121 << std::endl;
122 std::cout << " -fPw : power crossing the boundary of the domains"
123 << std::endl;
124 std::cout << " switches: -op PREFIX" << std::endl;
125 std::cout << " specify prefix for output file(s)"
126 << std::endl;
127 std::cout << " -t look-up table file" << std::endl;
128 std::cout << " look-up table for error functions - not "
129 "used by default"
130 << std::endl;
131 std::cout << " -a high-accuracy integration for matrix and "
132 "vector elements"
133 << std::endl;
134 std::cout << " -etm [1,2,3,...]" << std::endl;
135 std::cout << " number of evaluation terms in periodic "
136 "simulation, default value is 1"
137 << std::endl;
138 std::cout << " -th [1,2,3,...]" << std::endl;
139 std::cout << " number of parallel threads to run, "
140 "default value is 1"
141 << std::endl;
142 } else {
143 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
144 // Launch field evaluation
145 // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
146 SimJob *job = new SimJob;
147 if (tableFile != "") job->LoadTableFromFile(tableFile);
148 if (NeedsAccurate) Domain::EnableAccurate();
149 if (NeedsAccurate) GreenF::EnableAccurate();
150 if (NeedsAccurate) IncidentField::EnableAccurate();
151 if (etm < 1) {
152 etm = 1;
153 }
154 GreenF::AssignEtm(etm);
155 if (threads < 1 or threads > std::thread::hardware_concurrency()) {
156 threads = std::thread::hardware_concurrency();
157 }
158 SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads(threads);
159 SimJob::AssignThreads(threads);
160 return job->FieldEval(jobFile, positionFile, outPrefix, fields);
161 }
162 return 0;
163}
164
CLParser.h
Minimal command-line argument parsing utilities.
SIEFormPMCHW.h
Header file for the SIEFormPMCHW class.
SimJob.h
Orchestrates a full simulation run: parse job/subjobs, build the linear system, solve it,...
BFIELD
#define BFIELD
Output magnetic flux density .

#define POWER
Output total power crossing domain boundaries.

Output electric field E.
Definition SimJob.h:14

#define DFIELD
Output electric displacement .

#define POYVEC
Output Poynting vectors (inc/sca/ext)

static void EnableAccurate()
Enable globally more accurate (and usually slower) evaluation.

Set number of periodic evaluation terms (for periodic GFs).

static void EnableAccurate()
Request high‑accuracy evaluation paths (global).
Definition GreenF.cpp:90

static void EnableAccurate()
Enable high-accuracy integration for excitations.
Definition IncidentField.cpp:18
SIEFormPMCHW::AssignThreads

Configure how many threads to use for parallel assembly.

High-level driver for SIE simulations and field evaluation.

int FieldEval(std::string jobFile, std::string posFile, std::string outPrefix, uint fields, bool needsCS=false)
Evaluate fields on a set of points read from a file.

Set thread count used internally by SimJob.

Load binary lookup table used by periodic Green's function acceleration.
